MARLI — Portfolio Assistant
44 properties · Live data · Smart responses
AI
Hi — I'm MARLI, your Modernization Advisory assistant. I have full visibility into the 44-property Park Hotels & Resorts portfolio. Ask me about any property, schedule risk, budget, milestones, or elevator company performance. For questions about how PULSE features work, tap the ? button in any view header to open the Help panel.
Behind schedule? Over budget? Critical risks Hawaii portfolio Consultant assignments
